notes:
metaSTORY 3.0 — the big one:
- Lens & aperture per shot: the AI suggests a lens + f-stop, and you can override from a full list — ultra-wide for close-up distortion, 200mm compression, fisheye, anamorphic, tilt-shift, macro, 360.
- Advanced image character (ported from Kido): crystal-prism refraction, motion blur, imperfection, candid, film grain, halation, vintage flare, handheld. Neutral by default; dial in only what you want.
- Much better realism: the Kido real-motion-picture-glass engine now drives every photo frame; references are re-photographed from scratch, not copied.
- New Session button: a real clean slate that survives restarts.
- Scene counter, richer scene descriptions, a global director note, add/remove shots on the board.
- Fix: the Confirm bar no longer overlaps the version; version + manual Check for updates now in Settings.
